packs.description: Limit access to systems holding EU personal data to staff with a processing purpose, and deny broad/default access in line with data-minimisation and integrity & confidentiality.
packs.name: GDPR — personal data least privilege

templates.name: Data team → customer PII store
templates.summary: Grant the data team access to the customer PII database for defined processing.

templates.name: Deny-all to customer PII by default
templates.summary: Default-deny the whole organisation to the PII store; grant back by purpose.

packs.authority: U.S. HHS Office for Civil Rights
packs.description: Role-based access to electronic protected health information (ePHI): clinical staff get access to patient records, everyone else is denied, and break-glass is reserved for on-call responders.
packs.name: HIPAA Security Rule — ePHI access

templates.name: Clinical staff → patient records
templates.summary: Grant clinicians read/write access to the EHR system.

templates.name: Deny non-clinical staff to ePHI
templates.summary: Deny general/administrative staff direct access to patient records.

templates.name: Break-glass — on-call responders
templates.summary: Grant the incident-response on-call group emergency access to ePHI (audited, simulate before promoting).

packs.description: Annex A.5 access-control baseline: business-need-driven access to information systems, restricted privileged utilities, and a default-deny posture.
packs.name: ISO/IEC 27001 Annex A — access control

templates.name: Business need-to-know access
templates.summary: Grant a department access to its own line-of-business application.

templates.control: ISO 27001 A.8.18 — Use of privileged utility programs
templates.name: Restrict privileged utility access
templates.summary: Grant only the sysadmin role access to privileged admin tooling.

templates.name: Default-deny information systems
templates.summary: Deny everyone by default; grant access by business need.

packs.description: Least-privilege access to the cardholder data environment (CDE): restrict who can reach systems storing or processing cardholder data, and keep contractors and general staff out by default.
packs.name: PCI-DSS v4.0 — Cardholder Data Environment

templates.control: PCI-DSS 7.2 — Restrict access by business need-to-know
templates.name: CDE administration — payments team only
templates.summary: Grant the payments operations team admin access to the cardholder data environment.

templates.name: Block contractors from the CDE
templates.summary: Deny all contractor identities access to cardholder systems.

templates.name: Deny-all to cardholder data by default
templates.summary: Default-deny everyone to the cardholder database; grant back explicitly.

packs.description: Common-Criteria logical access: production systems restricted to engineering/SRE, privileged access limited to admins, and default-deny for the rest.
packs.name: SOC 2 — logical access controls

templates.name: Engineering → production apps
templates.summary: Grant engineering access to production application systems.

templates.name: Privileged prod access — admins only
templates.summary: Grant the platform-admin group admin access to production infrastructure.

templates.name: Deny-all to production by default
templates.summary: Default-deny the organisation to production hosts; grant back per role.

packs.description: Indonesia Personal Data Protection Law baseline: purpose-bound access to personal data with default-deny for the wider organisation.
packs.name: Indonesia — PDP Law (UU PDP)

templates.name: Authorised processors → personal data
templates.summary: Grant the data-processing team access to personal data.

templates.name: Default-deny personal data
templates.summary: Deny general staff access to personal data by default.

packs.description: Malaysia Personal Data Protection Act security-principle baseline: restrict personal-data access to authorised staff and default-deny the rest.
packs.name: Malaysia — PDPA 2010

templates.name: Authorised staff → personal data
templates.summary: Grant the data team access to the personal-data store.

templates.name: Default-deny personal data
templates.summary: Deny general staff access to personal data by default.

packs.description: Philippines Data Privacy Act baseline: access to personal data limited to authorised personnel with default-deny.
packs.name: Philippines — Data Privacy Act

templates.name: Authorised personnel → personal data
templates.summary: Grant the data team access to personal data.

templates.name: Default-deny personal data
templates.summary: Deny general staff access to personal data by default.

packs.description: PDPA protection obligation plus MAS Technology Risk Management access guidance: least-privilege to customer data and strict control of privileged access in financial systems.
packs.name: Singapore — PDPA + MAS TRM

templates.name: Service team → customer data
templates.summary: Grant the customer-service team access to the customer database.

templates.name: Privileged access — admins only
templates.summary: Restrict privileged access to core banking systems to the admin role.

templates.name: Default-deny customer data
templates.summary: Deny the organisation to the customer database by default.

packs.description: Thai Personal Data Protection Act baseline: limit access to personal data to staff with a lawful basis and deny default access.
packs.name: Thailand — PDPA

templates.name: Authorised staff → personal data
templates.summary: Grant the data team access to the personal-data store.

templates.name: Default-deny personal data
templates.summary: Deny general staff access to personal data by default.

packs.description: Personal Data Protection Decree baseline: restrict access to personal data, separate sensitive-data handling, and deny default access to comply with Decree 13's processing-purpose rules.
packs.name: Vietnam — PDPD (Decree 13/2023)

templates.name: Authorised processors → personal data
templates.summary: Grant the data-processing team access to the personal-data store.

templates.name: Restrict sensitive personal data
templates.summary: Deny general staff access to sensitive personal data categories.

packs.description: Australian Privacy Principles plus ACSC Essential Eight 'restrict administrative privileges': purpose-bound access to personal information and admin-only privileged access.
packs.name: Australia — Privacy Act + Essential Eight

templates.name: Authorised staff → personal information
templates.summary: Grant the data team access to the personal-information store.

templates.name: Restrict administrative privileges
templates.summary: Grant privileged infrastructure access to admins only.

templates.name: Default-deny personal information
templates.summary: Deny general staff access to personal information by default.

packs.authority: Autoridade Nacional de Proteção de Dados (ANPD)
packs.description: Brazilian General Data Protection Law baseline: restrict access to personal data to authorised agents with default-deny.
packs.name: Brazil — LGPD

templates.name: Authorised agents → personal data
templates.summary: Grant the data team access to the personal-data store.

templates.name: Default-deny personal data
templates.summary: Deny general staff access to personal data by default.

packs.authority: Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés
packs.description: CNIL security guidance under GDPR: authenticate and authorise access to personal data on a need-to-know basis with default-deny.
packs.name: France — CNIL (GDPR)

templates.name: Data team → personal data
templates.summary: Grant the data team access to the personal-data store.

templates.name: Default-deny personal data
templates.summary: Deny general staff access to personal data by default.

packs.authority: BfDI / Bundesamt für Sicherheit in der Informationstechnik
packs.description: German Federal Data Protection Act plus BSI Cloud Computing Compliance Criteria (C5) access controls: least-privilege to personal data and admin-controlled privileged access.
packs.name: Germany — BDSG + BSI C5

templates.control: BDSG §64 — Requirements for security of processing
templates.name: Data team → personal data
templates.summary: Grant the data team access to the personal-data store.

templates.name: Privileged access — admins only
templates.summary: Restrict privileged infrastructure access to the admin role.

templates.name: Default-deny personal data
templates.summary: Deny general staff access to personal data by default.

packs.authority: Federal Data Protection and Information Commissioner
packs.description: Revised Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection baseline: purpose-bound access to personal data with default-deny.
packs.name: Switzerland — nFADP

templates.name: Data team → personal data
templates.summary: Grant the data team access to the personal-data store.

templates.name: Default-deny personal data
templates.summary: Deny general staff access to personal data by default.

packs.authority: UAE Data Office / Dubai Electronic Security Center
packs.description: UAE Personal Data Protection Law and DESC information-security baseline: least-privilege access to personal data and tightly controlled privileged access.
packs.name: UAE — PDPL + DESC

templates.control: UAE PDPL Art. 9 — Security of processing
templates.name: Authorised staff → personal data
templates.summary: Grant the data team access to the personal-data store.

templates.name: Privileged access — admins only
templates.summary: Restrict privileged access to the admin role.

templates.name: Default-deny personal data
templates.summary: Deny general staff access to personal data by default.

packs.description: UK GDPR and Data Protection Act 2018 baseline: limit access to personal data to staff with a processing purpose and default-deny the wider organisation.
packs.name: United Kingdom — UK GDPR / DPA 2018

templates.control: UK GDPR Art. 5(1)(f) — Integrity and confidentiality
templates.name: Data team → personal data
templates.summary: Grant the data team access to the personal-data store for defined processing.

templates.control: UK GDPR Art. 32 — Security of processing
templates.name: Default-deny personal data
templates.summary: Deny the organisation to personal data by default.

packs.description: California Consumer Privacy Act / CPRA baseline: restrict access to consumer personal information and apply reasonable security with default-deny.
packs.name: United States — CCPA / CPRA (California)

templates.name: Authorised staff → consumer data
templates.summary: Grant the data team access to the consumer personal-information store.

templates.name: Default-deny consumer data
templates.summary: Deny general staff access to consumer data by default.
